zh.Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃
zh.lifeSummary: Richard De Hardene於1190年出生在英國瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1250年享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hardene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hardy
meanings: English, French, and Walloon: nickname for a brave or foolhardy man, from Old French, Middle English hardi ‘bold, courageous’. The surname of Walloon origin is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium (mainly in Belgian Limburg). Compare Hard 2.
Irish: in addition to being an importation of the English name, this is also found as an Anglicized form (by partial translation) of Gaelic Mac Giolla Deacair ‘son of the hard lad’.
Americanized form of Swiss German Härdi: from a pet form of an ancient Germanic personal name composed with hard ‘brave, strong’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Richard De Hardene was born in 1190, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1250, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard De Hardene est né en 1190, à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1250, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard De Hardene wurde 1190 in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1250 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Richard De Hardene è nato il nel 1190 nel Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1250, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard De Hardeneは1190年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1250年に60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard De Hardene(은)는 1190년 영국 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1250년 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard De Hardene nasceu em 1190, em Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1250, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard De Hardene родился в 1190 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1250 г. в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard De Hardene nació en 1190, en Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1250, a la edad de 60 años.
